decision_card.hypothesis: The scheduled CME close-to-reopen interval accumulates information and inventory in micro Bitcoin and Ether.  A causal policy that observes only the first quotes after the 17:00 Chicago reopen can distinguish continuation, fade, common-gap and relative-gap states with executable edge after costs.
decision_card.next_materially_distinct_alternative: A new external fundamental or alternative-data representation, because the remaining cached directional and relative-value families are already terminal.
decision_card.smallest_decisive_experiment: Sixteen pooled one-trade-per-session policies on the already acquired 2022 discovery and unchanged 2023 chronological validation TBBO data; exact 50K replay opens only after positive held stressed economics, at least 100 events, two positive half-years and two positive market contributions.
decision_card.strongest_argument_against: The reopen gap may already be fully incorporated in the first executable quote, while MBT/MET contract economics and spreads may make any remaining response too small for a Trading Combine.
